series_metadata.title: Dramaia: The Unwritten Pages
series_metadata.target_audience: Adults interested in complex relationships, mystery, and high-quality visual storytelling

core_themes: The weight of the past on the present

narrative_engine.primary_conflict: Anthony's attempt to protect his current family from the resurfacing past (Jamie) and the present threat (Franz).
narrative_engine.secondary_conflict: Jamie's struggle to reclaim her autonomy from Franz's obsession.
narrative_engine.mystery_hook: What exactly happened between Anthony, Jamie, and Franz in high school? What is the 'story before the story' that Dramaya mentions?
narrative_engine.pacing_style: Slow-burn tension with sudden bursts of psychological or physical violence.

key_events: Anthony and Jamie reconnect after years.
Franz reappears and establishes his territorial claim over Jamie.
Franz discovers Anthony's family, identifying his vulnerability.
Anthony tries to handle Franz alone to protect Jamie.
Franz begins to stalk Anthony's family directly.
Jamie discovers a hidden truth about Franz's past actions.

act_3_climax_resolution.focus: The Breaking Point and Truth Revealed
key_events: A direct confrontation between Anthony and Franz.
The 'high school secret' is fully revealed.
Resolution of the immediate threat, but lasting scars remain.

episode_1.title: Ce soir-là (That Night)
episode_1.summary: Anthony and Jamie reconnect at a gathering. A moment of nostalgia leads to a walk home, but Anthony refuses to enter her apartment, hinting at a complicated current life.

episode_2.title: La Rencontre (The Encounter)
episode_2.summary: Anthony is confronted by Franz on his way home. Franz reveals he saw them together and issues a veiled threat, claiming Jamie belongs to him.

episode_3.title: Le Silence (The Silence)
episode_3.summary: After the confrontation, Anthony returns to his sleeping family, feeling guilt and relief. He texts Jamie. Franz watches from the shadows, realizing Anthony has a weakness.

episode_4.title: L'Intrusion (The Intrusion)
episode_4.summary: Franz forces his way into Jamie's apartment late at night. He uses psychological terror, watching her change through a mirror before a violent climax with a broken glass.

episode_5.title: Les Ombres du Passé (Shadows of the Past)
episode_5.summary: Jamie, shaken, reaches out to Anthony. They meet to discuss Franz. We get flashbacks to their high school days, hinting at a traumatic event involving all three.

episode_6.title: La Filature (The Tail)
episode_6.summary: Franz begins to stalk Anthony's daily routine, getting closer to his home and his daughter's school. Anthony notices the signs and becomes paranoid.

episode_7.title: Le Piège (The Trap)
episode_7.summary: Franz sets a trap for Anthony, trying to provoke him into a public scene to discredit him. Anthony almost falls for it but is saved by Jamie's warning.

episode_8.title: La Vérité Éclate (The Truth Breaks)
episode_8.summary: The full story of high school is revealed: Franz was responsible for a major accident or betrayal that separated Anthony and Jamie. Anthony confronts Franz with this proof.

episode_9.title: Le Choc (The Clash)
episode_9.summary: A physical and psychological showdown between Anthony and Franz. Jamie intervenes, not as a victim, but as a decisive force.

episode_10.title: Les Pages Écrites (The Written Pages)
episode_10.summary: The aftermath. Franz is removed from their lives (legally or otherwise). Anthony and Jamie find closure, not necessarily by getting back together, but by freeing themselves from the past.

color_palette.anthony_scenes: Warm ambers, deep browns, soft shadows (Sanctuary)
color_palette.jamie_scenes: Cool blues, sterile whites, muted tones (Isolation/Vulnerability)
color_palette.franz_scenes: High contrast, deep blacks, cold greens, harsh lighting (Threat)

sound_design.music: Minimalist piano, ambient drones, sudden silence for tension
sound_design.foley: Emphasis on breathing, footsteps, fabric rustling, and environmental sounds (rain, city noise)
